response:
Here's what I found — 15 planning-related pages in your Notion workspace:

**Product/Feature Specs**
- **Plans** (Jan 30) — Core plans feature definition/types
- **Plans MVP** (Feb 2) — MVP parameters (source, length, time/day, reminders, age)
- **Plan Creation Wizard** (Feb 4) — Wizard rollout plan
- **Plans** (Jan 30, second) — Plan creation flow doc

**UI/UX Feature Pages**
- **plan creation loader** (Feb 25) — Loading screen improvements for `[id].tsx`
- **Plan outline updates** (Feb 26) — Updates to existing plan loading screens
- **complete plan** (Mar 1) — Success screen, confetti, close button UX
- **Plan Creation Archive** (Mar 2) — Archiving existing plans when creating new ones
- **Plan tab state & UI** (Feb 25) — Plan tab display logic (pinned, active, per type)
- **New Plan Feedback** (Mar 11) — User feedback: blocks jumping around, flow issues

**Technical/Data**
- **Plan Statistics Tables** (Feb 25) — `plan_completion_log`, run tracking schema
- **Plan Block Recipes — Block List Review** (Mar 18, today!) — Block recipe review with Matt + Kyle
- **plan wizard changes** (Feb 25) — Wizard DB changes

**Other**
- **Release Planning** (Aug 2025) — General release planning
- **Backend Claude Code Architecture - Sub-Agents & Skills Implementation Plan** (Nov 2025) — Claude sub-agents/skills architecture doc

The most recently active ones are **Plan Block Recipes** (today) and **New Plan Feedback** (Mar 11). Want me to fetch the contents of any of these?
